name: marketing-kit
description: 20 battle-tested marketing skills for AI agents: publish checklist (favicon/OG/titles), search engine registration, GA4/GTM analytics, universal CRM connection, card news, slide decks, print design with QA loop, brand guide extraction, AI-text humanizer, content repurposing (Threads/LinkedIn), Zernio social automation + paid ads, free newsletters via Resend, cold email, lead magnets with Google Sheets DB, pre-meeting research, Dan's realistic marketing advice, YC-style validation, viral ideas, first-principles coaching.
